-- $500/day × 12 weeks = $42K → +0.18 Q (equivalent to T3 R&D at $500K!)
-- Global dev 0.0045 × ln(...) — 5× WORSE.
-- R&D T1 $/Q: $4.2M/Q. Targeted dev $/Q: $230K/Q. Targeted 18× better.
